utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Each item is fully specified with relevant details: the property has details and price; financing includes type, terms, and fees; legal_services has service type and cost; moving_services includes arrangements and cost; setup_services includes utility type and cost; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are covered and fully detailed.
